_doc: THE DATA-OWNERSHIP CONSTITUTION. One declared owner per answer-category; one declared pipe per register; one declared binding per face. VVLTVS (scripts/vvltvs-organ.py) reads and ENFORCES this file. A face is true only when its number has a live PRODUCER and a live CONSUMER and is bound to its basis — proven by this topology, never asserted. RECONCILED 2026-07-17 to current reality (verified by clone+grep of organvm-corpvs-testamentvm + organvm/portfolio): the corpus migrated its metrics to `calculate-metrics.py` -> `system-metrics.json` (the SSOT, computed daily, currently 175 repos incl. code_files/test_files), and the 4444J99 profile moved to a live-API engine. The two former registers `system-vars` and `code-substance` are RETIRED from active checks — `system-vars` is DORMANT (producer `build_vars` unwired; its only consumer, the `<!-- v: -->` numeric stamping via the `organvm refresh` CLI + vars-targets.yaml, is wired into no workflow and reflected in no live README) and `code-substance` is SUPERSEDED (code_files/test_files now computed into `system-metrics.json.computed`). No LIVE face projects from either, so VVLTVS was reporting phantom drift against non-flowing pipes. Their prior remediation notes ('re-add build_vars', 'wire manifestatio') described non-flowing pipes and are removed; the orphaned files are kept (see `retired`). CONVERGE, DO NOT REBUILD: the homes already exist; this file names what already owns each answer and wires the verifier. Paths are relative to LIMEN_WORKSPACE_ROOT (~/Workspace).

ssot._doc: The live compute — the ONE enumeration everything else projects from. Its repo count derives from `gh api` at generate-time (repo_count_basis: live-public-gh-api); code_files/test_files derive from a file census (file_count_basis). Written daily by organvm-corpvs-testamentvm/scripts/calculate-metrics.py. VVLTVS reads it, never recomputes it.

named_variables._doc: Different TRUE counts, not one drifting number. The curated-vs-live split is a real, intentional distinction. A face showing curated_repos and a face showing total_repos are NOT in conflict IF each binds the right variable. The corpus SSOT carries all of them; faces must bind the right one.

code_files.means: source files across the censused repos

test_files.means: test files across the censused repos

retired._doc: Registers removed from VVLTVS's active drift checks 2026-07-17 because no LIVE face projects from them (traced: producer + consumer). Kept as an audit tombstone so the retirement is legible and never silently re-invented. The orphaned files stay in the corpus as dormant value-sources (deletion was rejected as needless aggression — they mislead no live surface).

system-vars.why_dormant: Frozen at 148; its producer (build_vars) is unwired from metrics-refresh.yml (since 2026-05-22). Its only declared consumer is the `<!-- v:KEY -->` numeric stamping via vars-targets.yaml + the `organvm refresh` CLI — which is wired into NO workflow and is NOT reflected in the live sub-org profile READMEs (they carry no v: markers; generate-github-configs.py resolves org NAMES + static content, not numeric vars from this register). So NO live face projects frozen values from it. The former 4444J99 profile-bio consumer (ecosystem.yml -> sync-readme.py) was replaced by the live-API profile engine.
system-vars.superseded_by: the live-API profile engine (see engine_owned_faces) for the profile; the SSOT for any aggregate count. Kept as the dormant value-source should the `<!-- v: -->` stamping ever be revived.

code-substance.why_dormant: Held audited code_files/test_files. calculate-metrics.py now computes code_files/test_files DIRECTLY into system-metrics.json.computed (file census: code_files=10330, test_files=2539), and organvm/portfolio/scripts/sync-trust-metrics.mjs derives vitals FROM the SSOT computed block — not from this report. manifestatio-code-audit.py (the writer) is wired into no workflow; the report is 151 days stale and read by no live face (only docs mention it). Kept for its historical audit record.

registers.owns: the canonical LINKS HOME — every outward URL (deployments, GitHub-Pages, funding, custom domains/social), folded from the partial homes into one register

fed_by._note: Fed by build-links-registry.py (local-first, gh-api fallback for the portfolio-owned sources), wired into the daily metrics-refresh pipeline. If this step is ever dropped, VENA flags the conduit stale UPSTREAM of any links surface.

engine_owned_faces._doc: Faces rendered by a dedicated live-API engine with their OWN provability predicate — NOT SSOT-compared here (their basis differs from the corpus curated SSOT, so a comparison would manufacture false drift). VVLTVS defers to the engine's own predicate.

profile-4444J99.provability: every number is in 4444J99/4444J99/assets/stats-manifest.json (api-attested = re-run the query; repo-attested = the repo's own CI); scripts/profile-verify.py is the predicate (exit 0 iff no third-party widget, no remote image, no unprovable number). Regenerated daily by .github/workflows/profile.yml.
profile-4444J99.note: Replaces the former profile-bio face (which bound the now-retired system-vars register).

faces.stamper: HEALTHY (2026-07-17): organvm/portfolio/.github/workflows/ci.yml 'Refresh canonical metrics from corpus' fetches system-metrics.json fresh daily at 06:30 UTC (fail-open to last-known-good). The prior 'stale Jun-19 fork / 116-vs-171' note was itself stale; the pull model works. VENA/SPECVLVM keep it honest by comparing the committed copy against the live SSOT.

REBOUND to the SSOT (2026-07-17): organvm/portfolio/scripts/sync-trust-metrics.mjs derives vitals.substance.{code_files,test_files} from system-metrics.json.computed.{code_files,test_files} (file-census basis) — NOT from the retired code-substance report. Committed vitals lag the SSOT by a daily-fetch cycle (self-heals); SPECVLVM surfaces any real divergence.

links_home._doc: RESOLVED — a canonical register fed by scripts/build-links-registry.py (see registers.links), which CONVERGES the authoritative partial homes below into one register. The profile links-in-bio + portfolio link surfaces should PROJECT from this register, not maintain their own copies. VENA watches its conduit; if the feeder is dropped from CI, the home surfaces as stale.

converges.holds: GH-Pages page URLs + CNAME + build status (folded via gh-api fallback, kind=page)
GitHub Sponsors + custom payrail link (folded via gh-api fallback, kind=funding)
custom domains + social handles with no home yet (etceter4.com, padavano.vercel) — folded as status:unowned so they are visible until adopted
prose delivery notes — their deployment URLs are redundant with repo-registry, so NOT separately folded (keeps the fold byte-reproducible in CI, where those repos are absent)
